emails.subject: RE: EV7251 Minibook
emails.body: RE: EV7251 Minibook Thanks man, however, I think we are missing leg 9, B, C on the JP swaps. Could you re-run and send back? I would really appreciate it. Eric To: Boyt, Eric

emails.subject: RE: EV7251 Minibook
emails.body: Eric, Leg B has already terminated (06/30/1999), and legs 9 and C are in Canadian books. I left a message w/ book admins in Canada. As soon as they get w/ me I'll run a minibook for you on those 2 deals. Errol To: McLaughlin Jr., Errol

emails.subject: RE: EV7251 Minibook
